description: Update a user's preferences. Self-service for any authenticated user; elevated system roles (admin, super_admin, root) can update on behalf of another user. Domain packs declare which preference keys are meaningful.

target.description: Target user-id. If omitted, defaults to the calling user.

target_user_id.description: User-id of the user whose preferences are being updated. If omitted, defaults to the caller.

updates.description: Key-value map of preference fields to set. Valid keys are domain-specific.

note.description: Optional supervisor note explaining why preferences were changed (recorded in supervisor_notes).
